 REPORT OF FOREIGN PRIVATE ISSUER

COMMISSION

 FORM 6-K

 Pursuant to Rule 13a-16 or 15d-16 under 

 the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 

 For the month of May, 2026

 Indicate by check mark if the registrant is submitting the Form 6-K in paper as permitted by Regulation S-T Rule 101(b)(1): &#8195;&#8195;&#8195;

permitted by Regulation S-T Rule 101(b)(7): &#8195;&#8195;&#8195; 

 Material Contained in this Report: 

 I. 
 English translations of the original Japanese-language documents, as filed with the Tokyo Stock Exchange on
May 8, 2026, with respect to the registrant&#8217;s results of operations for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. 

 II. 
 English translations of the FY2026 Presentation Documents, as filed by the registrant with the Tokyo Stock
Exchange on May 8, 2026. 

 III. 
 English translation of the Notice Concerning the Holding of Ordinary General Shareholders&#8217; Meeting to
be held on June 17, 2026, as filed by the registrant with the Tokyo Stock Exchange on May 8, 2026. 

 IV. 
 English translation of the Notice Concerning the Disposition of Treasury Stock under the Restricted Stock
Compensation Plan, as filed by the registrant with the Tokyo Stock Exchange on May 8, 2026. 

 SIGNATURES 

 Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed
on its behalf by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized. 

 Toyota Motor Corporation
